headline: GE Defense Role Grows As Valuation And Upside Debate Intensifies
summary: GE Aerospace has agreed with the Indian Air Force to set up a depot to support F404-IN20 engines used in its fighter fleet. The U.S. Department of Defense has reached out to GE Aerospace and several automakers about potentially ramping up production of military equipment. These moves expand General Electric's role in defense support, both in India and within the U.S. defense industrial base. General Electric, NYSE:GE, is drawing fresh attention as its Aerospace business deepens ties with...

headline: Fed Chair Hearing, Tesla Earnings: What to Watch This Week
summary: Earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with nearly 20% of the S&P 500 scheduled to report quarterly earnings. Big names reporting include Tesla, Boeing and Intel. Investors will also watch the scheduled testimony of Kevin Warsh, President Trump’s nominee for Federal Reserve chair, for signals on how he’d lead the central bank.
